name: TD SYNNEX Corporation
description: TD SYNNEX is a leading global distributor and solutions aggregator for the IT ecosystem. Formed through the merger of SYNNEX and Tech Data, the company connects technology manufacturers with a vast network of resellers and service providers. With a workforce of approximately 22,000 employees, TD SYNNEX provides a comprehensive portfolio of products, services, and solutions, including cloud, cybersecurity, data analytics, and infrastructure. By simplifying complex technology supply chains, the company enables its partners to scale faster, manage digital transformation, and deliver innovative outcomes to end users across more than 100 countries worldwide.
